on_failure_followup: Update fixture README to record actual Claude Code behaviour and activate the skills/_data/SKILL.md workaround (see T20). This field is operational guidance, not a falsifiable assertion.
rationale: Data-only plugin must install cleanly AND leave a readable plugin.json on disk. Install exit code alone is insufficient — install can succeed-as-no-op without mounting. The runner first probes `claude plugins --help` to choose the canonical install CLI (the design has not pinned which form is correct; --from-dir may not exist on the shipped harness). Filesystem assertion proves 'mounted', not just 'install exited 0'.
